name: Ambra Health Medical Imaging Cloud API
what_it_does: Ambra Health REST API for cloud-based medical imaging management and PACS (Picture Archiving and Communication System). Enables AI agents to manage DICOM medical image storage and retrieval, handle image sharing and routing between providers, access study and series metadata, integrate with radiology AI analysis tools, manage patient image archives, handle referral-based image sharing workflows, retrieve radiology report data, connect imaging centers with EHR systems, and support teleradiology and remote reading workflows.
use_cases: Managing DICOM image storage and retrieval from radiology workflow agents
Routing medical images between providers and specialists from care coordination agents
Integrating imaging data with EHR systems from clinical data exchange agents
Managing patient image archives and release from health information agents
not_for: Non-medical imaging without DICOM and clinical radiology workflows
Consumer photo sharing without medical-grade DICOM compliance
Research imaging without clinical PACS workflow
best_when: A radiology group, imaging center, teleradiology service, or health system using Ambra wants AI agents to automate image routing, sharing, archive management, and EHR integration.
avoid_when: HIPAA: Medical imaging data is PHI with additional sensitivity — radiological images can identify individuals and reveal health conditions. DICOM data contains embedded patient demographics. BAA required. AI analysis of medical images requires clinical validation.

auth.notes: Ambra Health uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for API access. Organization-level credentials with study, patient, and sharing scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. Acquired by Intelerad 2022. DICOM standard compliance for image exchange.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — medical imaging cloud enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-study storage and per-user enterprise pricing
pricing.notes: New York City. Founded 2010. Cloud-native medical imaging platform. Acquired by Intelerad 2022. Used by imaging centers, teleradiology groups, and health systems. Focus on cloud PACS and image sharing. Strong AI integration marketplace. Competes with Sectra and traditional PACS vendors.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; image upload/download bandwidth limits apply

known_agent_gotchas: HIPAA: Medical imaging PHI with embedded patient demographics in DICOM tags
No public MCP server — OAuth2 and API key with enterprise partner program
DICOM image files are large — download agents must handle large binary transfers
AI medical image analysis requires FDA clearance for clinical use — automation must not bypass clinical review
Image sharing links expire — time-sensitive access tokens for patient-facing image sharing
Intelerad acquisition (2022) — API roadmap consolidating with Intelerad product suite
agent_readiness.security_notes: Medical imaging PHI with DICOM patient data. HIPAA, SOC2, GDPR, HITRUST. OAuth2. Multi-region data residency. BAA required. AI analysis requires clinical validation.

security_score_components.security_notes: Medical imaging PHI. HIPAA, SOC2, GDPR, HITRUST. OAuth2. Multi-region. BAA required. DICOM patient data in image metadata.
